---
env:
  - WLJS
origin: https://github.com/JerryI/wljs-html-support
update: false
needsContainer: true
registered: true
---
```mathematica
HTMLForm["<h2>Hello World</h2>"]
```
renders HTML tags to the output cell

import Notebook from '@site/src/components/wljs-notebook-react';

<Notebook code="" name="adoration-73e25">adoration-73e25</Notebook>

It can be used as alternative to an [HTML-cells](../../Cell%20types/HTML.md) type.
